problem id: bbf1dba3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  00001110 -> 00000000
  10111110 -> 01000010
  10111011 -> 10010000
  01011010 -> 00100001
  11101110 -> 01100011
  10100101 -> 01010010
  10101101 -> 11010010
  00011101 -> 10000000
  10001010 -> 00000000

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 11010010
